interruptions.message: A browser or ChatGPT permission is required before continuing.

resume.reason: The user must update local browser or Codex permission settings.

blocker.message: A browser or ChatGPT permission is required before continuing.

remediation.label: Enable Codex upload permission
remediation.instruction: Open Codex Settings > Computer Use > Chrome > Permissions and set Uploads to Always allow.

remediation.label: Allow Chrome extension file URLs
remediation.instruction: Open chrome://extensions, select the Codex extension, and enable Allow access to file URLs.
